name: BlackLine
tagline: AI-powered financial close automation with transaction matching and compliance
description:
BlackLine is a cloud-based platform that automates and controls the core accounting processes of the financial close. It is designed specifically for finance and accounting teams in mid-size to large enterprises. The software replaces manual, error-prone tasks with automated workflows, significantly increasing efficiency and reliability during period-end closing, reporting, and compliance cycles.

The platform’s core function is to automate account reconciliations, transaction matching, and journal entry management. Key features include its intelligent transaction matching engine, which uses rules and algorithms to automatically pair millions of records from source systems like ERPs with bank statements or sub-ledgers, flagging only true exceptions for review. It also provides a centralized task management hub for the entire close process and maintains a continuous, immutable audit trail for all activities and data changes.

A primary use case is the monthly intercompany reconciliation process. Instead of teams across different entities emailing spreadsheets, BlackLine provides a unified workspace where balances are automatically compared, discrepancies are highlighted, and required settlements are tracked to completion with full visibility. This eliminates manual follow-ups and reduces risk.

The main benefit is a faster, more accurate, and fully auditable financial close. By automating repetitive work, teams can cut their close cycle time by half or more, reallocating staff to higher-value analysis and strategic tasks. The platform ensures consistency, strengthens internal controls, and provides the documentation needed for both internal and external auditors.
